zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Seissyl於1196年出生在英國威爾斯波斯布雷孔時，他的父親Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe51歲，母親Lleucu verch Gruffudd29歲。他於1251年與Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾結婚。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ap Seissyl于1196年出生在英国威尔斯波斯布雷孔时，他的父亲Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe51岁，母亲Lleucu verch Gruffudd29岁。他于1251年与Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾结婚。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Seissyl was born in 1196, in Brecon, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe, was 51 and his mother, Lleucu verch Gruffudd, was 29. He married Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan in 1251, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ap Seissyl est né en 1196, à Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lleucu verch Gruffudd, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan en 1251, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Seissyl 1196 in Brecon, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe 51 und seine Mutter Lleucu verch Gruffudd 29. Er hat 1251 in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan geheiratet.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Seissyl è nato il nel 1196 nel Brecon, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lleucu verch Gruffudd, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan nel 1251, nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Seissylが1196年にイギリスウェールズポウイスブレコンで生まれた時，父Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffeは51歳，母Lleucu verch Gruffuddは29歳であった。1251年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアでGwladu verch Morgan Fychanと結婚した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Seissyl(이)가 1196년 영국 웨일스 파우이스 브레콘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lleucu verch Gruffudd(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1251년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan(와)과 결혼했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Seissyl nasceu em 1196, em Brecon, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lleucu verch Gruffudd, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan em 1251, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Seissyl родился в 1196 г. в местности брекон, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lleucu verch Gruffudd, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan в 1251 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Seissyl nació en 1196, en Brecon, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lleucu verch Gruffudd, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Gwladu verch Morgan Fychan en 1251, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
